# This cell is generated from runtime parameters. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2161015
secret_name = "servicebus-connectionstring"
topic_name = "nsip-exam-timetable"
subscription_name = "nsip-exam-timetable"
output_file_name = "NSIPExamTimeTable"
# Establish the connection with the Service Bus

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
akv_name=spark.sparkContext.environment.get('keyVaultName', 'get')
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from azure.servicebus import ServiceBusClient, ServiceBusMessage

conn_str = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(akv_name, secret_name, kv_linked_service)
servicebus_client = ServiceBusClient.from_connection_string(conn_str=conn_str, logging_enable=True)

with servicebus_client:
        receiver = servicebus_client.get_subscription_receiver(topic_name=topic_name, subscription_name=subscription_name)

        with receiver:
            received_msgs = receiver.peek_messages( max_message_count=20) 
received_msgs

from datetime import date
import pandas as pd

storage_account=mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account')
todaysdate = date.today().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")

dct=json.loads(new_messages)

df=pd.DataFrame(dct)

new_lines = []
for ind in df['caseReference'].index.tolist()[:]:

    caseReference = df.loc[ ind , 'caseReference' ]

    events = df.loc[ ind , 'events' ]

    for event in events:

        df_e=pd.DataFrame(event)

        for ind in df_e.index.tolist():

            new_dct={}
            new_dct['caseReference'] = caseReference

            for col in df_e.columns.tolist():

                if col!='eventLineItems':

                    new_dct[col] = df_e.loc[ind  , col ]

                else:
                    
                    eventline = df_e.loc[ind  , 'eventLineItems' ]
                    df_el=pd.DataFrame(eventline , index=[0])

                    desc = df_el.iloc[0,0]

                    new_dct['eventLineItemDescription'] = desc
                    new_dct['eventLineItemID'] = ind + 1

            print(new_dct)
            new_lines.append(new_dct)

df = spark.read.json(spark.sparkContext.parallelize([new_lines]))
df
